Control Description: Implement firewalls and DDoS protection mechanisms at the network level to protect cloud services.
Azure Policy Initiative: Azure DDoS Protection Standard policies; NSG policies; Azure Firewall policies
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Secure Score: Protect applications against DDoS attacks; Recommendation: Azure DDoS Protection Standard should be enabled
Azure Services/Features: Azure Firewall Premium; Azure DDoS Network Protection; Network Security Groups; Web Application Firewall
Implementation Notes: Deploy Azure Firewall with threat intelligence-based filtering and DDoS Network Protection on VNets hosting workloads

Control Description: Apply secure configurations (OS Hardening) to operating systems, networks, servers, and user accounts.
Azure Policy Initiative: Microsoft Cloud Security Benchmark; Azure Automanage Machine Configuration policies
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Recommendation: Machines should have a vulnerability assessment solution; System updates should be installed
Azure Services/Features: Azure Automanage; Guest Configuration; Microsoft Defender for Servers
Implementation Notes: Apply CIS benchmarks via Guest Configuration; enable vulnerability assessment

Control Description: Manage permissions and identity centrally using RBAC, IBAC, ABAC mechanisms, and implement tokenization for sensitive data.
Azure Policy Initiative: ISO 27001:2022 (A.9 Access Control); Azure RBAC built-in policies; PIM policies
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Recommendation: Role-Based Access Control should be used on Kubernetes Services; Use Azure RBAC for Key Vault
Azure Services/Features: Microsoft Entra ID; Azure RBAC; Privileged Identity Management (PIM); Azure Key Vault (tokenization)
Implementation Notes: Implement PIM for just-in-time privileged access; enforce RBAC across all resources

Control Description: Audit user activities and data movements using SIEM systems integrated with log aggregation tools.
Azure Policy Initiative: Enable auditing and logging policies; Diagnostic Settings policies; Activity Log policies
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Secure Score: Enable auditing and logging
Azure Services/Features: Microsoft Sentinel; Log Analytics workspace; Azure Monitor; Diagnostic Settings
Implementation Notes: Deploy Sentinel workspace; configure data connectors for all Azure services; enable Activity Log streaming

Control Description: Enable two-factor (2FA) or multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all users accessing cloud services.
Azure Policy Initiative: Microsoft Cloud Security Benchmark (IM-4); Conditional Access policies
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Recommendation: MFA should be enabled on accounts with owner permissions; MFA should be enabled on accounts with write permissions
Azure Services/Features: Microsoft Entra Conditional Access; Microsoft Authenticator; FIDO2 keys
Implementation Notes: Create Conditional Access policy requiring MFA for all users; exclude break-glass accounts with compensating controls

Control Description: Enable conditional access based on geographic location (Geo-Blocking) to restrict access from unauthorized regions.
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: N/A (Entra ID feature - not monitored by Defender)
Azure Services/Features: Microsoft Entra Conditional Access; Named Locations
Implementation Notes: Configure named locations for Oman and approved regions; block access from high-risk countries

Control Description: Conduct technical security assessments (penetration testing) and risk analysis for cloud environments.
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Recommendation: Vulnerability assessment should be enabled on your SQL servers; Machines should have vulnerability findings resolved
Azure Services/Features: Microsoft Defender Vulnerability Management; Qualys integration; third-party pen testing
Implementation Notes: Enable Defender vulnerability assessment; schedule annual penetration tests; document risk register

Control Description: Classify all data according to sensitivity levels as per applicable laws and regulations.
Azure Policy Initiative: Microsoft Cloud Security Benchmark (DP-1); SQL Data Discovery policies
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Recommendation: Sensitive data in your SQL databases should be classified
Azure Services/Features: Microsoft Purview Data Map; Sensitivity Labels; SQL Data Discovery and Classification
Implementation Notes: Deploy Purview for data discovery; apply sensitivity labels (Public

Control Title: Data Encryption in Transit and at Rest
Control Description: Protect data during transfer, processing, and storage using encryption mechanisms.
Azure Policy Initiative: TLS enforcement policies; Storage encryption policies; SQL TDE policies
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Recommendation: Secure transfer to storage accounts should be enabled; Transparent Data Encryption should be enabled
Azure Services/Features: Azure Storage Service Encryption; TLS 1.2+ enforcement; Azure SQL TDE
Implementation Notes: Enforce HTTPS-only on storage; require TLS 1.2 minimum; enable TDE on all databases

Control Description: Apply encryption using single, double, or customer-managed keys (BYOK) based on data sensitivity.
Azure Policy Initiative: Microsoft Cloud for Sovereignty Baseline Confidential (SO.3); CMK policies for Storage/SQL/Disks
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Recommendation: Storage accounts should use customer-managed key for encryption; SQL servers should use customer-managed keys
Azure Services/Features: Azure Key Vault; Key Vault Managed HSM; Customer-Managed Keys; Double Encryption
Implementation Notes: Deploy Key Vault with HSM backing; configure CMK for storage accounts and SQL databases containing classified data

Control Description: Implement the principle of least privilege for access to data in transit and cloud resources.
Azure Policy Initiative: ISO 27001:2022 (A.9.1); JIT access policies; PIM policies
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Recommendation: Management ports should be closed on your virtual machines; Just-In-Time access should be enabled
Azure Services/Features: Privileged Identity Management; Just-In-Time VM Access; Azure Bastion
Implementation Notes: Enable JIT access for VMs; implement PIM for all privileged roles; conduct quarterly access reviews

Control Description: Enable data loss prevention (Cloud DLP) capabilities across all cloud applications to prevent data leakage.
Azure Policy Initiative: Manual (Microsoft Purview DLP); Defender for Cloud Apps policies
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Integration: Microsoft Defender for Cloud Apps
Azure Services/Features: Microsoft Purview DLP; Microsoft Defender for Cloud Apps; Endpoint DLP
Implementation Notes: Configure DLP policies in Purview for Exchange
column11: Teams; integrate with Defender for Cloud Apps for SaaS

Control Description: Configure antivirus and antimalware systems for all servers and user devices.
Azure Policy Initiative: Microsoft Cloud Security Benchmark (ES-2); Microsoft Antimalware extension policies
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Secure Score: Enable endpoint protection; Recommendation: Endpoint protection should be installed
Azure Services/Features: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint; Microsoft Defender for Servers; Microsoft Antimalware extension
Implementation Notes: Enable Defender for Servers P2; deploy Defender for Endpoint to all endpoints; configure real-time protection

Control Description: Install and maintain patch management software covering all systems and applications.
Azure Policy Initiative: Update Management policies; Azure Update Manager policies
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Recommendation: System updates should be installed on your machines; System updates on machines should be installed
Azure Services/Features: Azure Update Manager; Windows Update for Business; Linux package management
Implementation Notes: Configure Azure Update Manager; create maintenance windows; enable automatic assessment

Control Description: Maintain regular offline backups of data, ensure secure and encrypted storage, with recovery capability for emergencies.
Azure Policy Initiative: Azure Backup policies; Immutable vault policies; GRS/ZRS policies
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Recommendation: Azure Backup should be enabled for Virtual Machines; Long-term geo-redundant backup should be enabled
Azure Services/Features: Recovery Services Vault; Azure Backup; Immutable Vault; Geo-redundant storage
Implementation Notes: Enable immutable vaults; configure GRS for cross-region recovery; test restores quarterly; maintain offline backup copies

Control Description: Develop and maintain a plan for responding to cybersecurity incidents affecting cloud services.
Azure Services/Features: Microsoft Sentinel Playbooks; Logic Apps; Azure Monitor Action Groups
Implementation Notes: Create Sentinel automation rules; define incident classification; establish CDC notification procedures

Control Description: Organizations must classify data per Oman regulations before requesting external cloud services approval.
Azure Services/Features: Microsoft Purview Compliance Manager; Sensitivity Labels
Implementation Notes: Complete data classification exercise; document classifications; submit to CDC with approval request

Control Description: Organizations must comply with all policies and circulars issued by the Cyber Defense Centre.
Azure Services/Features: Azure Policy custom initiatives; Compliance Manager
Implementation Notes: Create custom initiative mapping CDC controls; assign to all subscriptions; report compliance quarterly

Control Description: CDC determines approved geographic regions for hosting classified and sensitive data after verifying provider compliance with data protection laws.
Azure Policy Initiative: Manual (region restriction policies); Allowed Locations policy
Azure Services/Features: Azure Policy Allowed Locations; Resource Tags
Implementation Notes: Restrict deployments to CDC-approved regions; tag resources with data classification

Control Description: Prior written approval from CDC required for hosting data in non-approved geographic regions with full justification.
Azure Services/Features: Azure Policy Allowed Locations with exceptions; exemption documentation
Implementation Notes: Document business justification; submit to CDC; implement compensating controls

Control Description: Conduct risk assessment for external hosting, link to organizational risk register, and obtain head of organization approval.
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Defender for Cloud Secure Score; Attack Path Analysis
Azure Services/Features: Microsoft Defender for Cloud CSPM; Attack Path Analysis
Implementation Notes: Enable Defender CSPM; document risk assessment; link findings to organizational risk register

Control Description: Information security team must verify security controls implementation and submit technical audit reports to CDC every six months.
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Regulatory Compliance reports; Secure Score trends
Azure Services/Features: Azure Policy compliance reports; Workbooks; Power BI
Implementation Notes: Create compliance workbook; schedule semi-annual reports; maintain audit evidence

Control Description: Maintain local backup copies of all data following best practices, with ability to process within Oman if external cloud access is lost.
Azure Policy Initiative: Azure Backup policies; Cross-region restore policies
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Recommendation: Geo-redundant backup should be enabled
Azure Services/Features: Recovery Services Vault (local); Azure Site Recovery; Cross-region restore
Implementation Notes: Configure backup vault in Oman region (if available) or nearest approved region; test restore procedures

Control Description: AI applications via external cloud computing may be used subject to MTCIT policies and CDC controls.
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Defender for Cloud AI workload protection (preview)
Azure Services/Features: Azure OpenAI; AI Foundry; Defender for Cloud
Implementation Notes: Apply MTCIT AI policies; restrict AI service endpoints; implement content filtering

Control Description: Obtain all required permits from relevant authorities before using video/audio communication services in cloud packages.
Azure Services/Features: Microsoft Teams; Azure Communication Services
Implementation Notes: Obtain TRA approvals; document compliance; restrict unauthorized communication services

Control Description: Organizations must not store or transfer data classified as Secret or Top Secret to external cloud providers.
Azure Policy Initiative: Custom deny policies; Sensitivity label policies
Azure Services/Features: Microsoft Purview; Azure Policy deny rules; Sensitivity Labels
Implementation Notes: Create policy denying resources with Secret/Top Secret tags; enforce label-based access controls

Control Description: CDC approval for external cloud hosting is valid for two years and must be renewed with contract renewal.
Azure Services/Features: Azure Tags; Policy compliance tracking
Implementation Notes: Tag resources with approval date and expiry; create alert for renewal 90 days before expiry

Control Description: Organizations with existing external hosting must notify CDC and align with these controls upon contract renewal.
Azure Services/Features: Compliance documentation
Implementation Notes: Document existing deployments; submit to CDC; create remediation plan

Control Description: Organizations must apply approved policies from relevant authorities when managing encryption keys.
Azure Policy Initiative: Key Vault policies; CMK rotation policies
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Recommendation: Key Vault keys should have an expiration date
Azure Services/Features: Azure Key Vault; Key Vault Managed HSM; Key rotation policies
Implementation Notes: Implement key rotation; enable soft delete and purge protection; configure key expiration alerts

Control Description: CDC may revoke external cloud usage approval for non-compliance with controls, policies, or requirements.
Azure Services/Features: Azure Policy compliance state; Alerts
Implementation Notes: Monitor compliance continuously; remediate findings within SLA; document exceptions

Control Description: Provider must obtain written consent before modifying policies related to data processing, transfer, storage, destruction, or security.
Azure Services/Features: Service Health alerts; Change tracking
Implementation Notes: Subscribe to Azure Service Health; review Azure updates; document consent process

Control Description: Provider must not access, use, or dispose of stored, processed, or transferred data without prior written authorization.
Azure Services/Features: Customer Lockbox; Access reviews
Implementation Notes: Enable Customer Lockbox; require explicit approval for Microsoft support access

Control Description: Use encryption mechanisms at all stages (storage, transfer) preventing loss, alteration, unauthorized disclosure, or accidental destruction.
Azure Policy Initiative: TLS policies; Encryption at rest policies
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Recommendation: Secure transfer should be enabled; TDE should be enabled
Azure Services/Features: Azure Storage Encryption; TLS 1.2+; SQL TDE; Disk Encryption
Implementation Notes: Enforce TLS 1.2 minimum; enable encryption at rest for all services; use CMK where required

Control Description: Provider must not mix or combine organization data with other customers' data without prior written consent.
Azure Services/Features: Azure Dedicated Host; Isolated tenancy options
Implementation Notes: Consider Azure Dedicated Host for highly sensitive workloads; document tenant isolation requirements

Control Description: Provider must notify organization when any judicial or security authority outside Oman requests access to organization data.
Azure Services/Features: Legal documentation; Azure compliance reports
Implementation Notes: Review Azure Government Requests Report; establish notification procedures

Control Description: Provider must immediately notify CDC and organization of any security incident affecting organization data, systems, or protection mechanisms.
Azure Services/Features: Microsoft Sentinel; Defender for Cloud alerts; Service Health
Implementation Notes: Configure Sentinel to alert on security incidents; establish CDC notification workflow via Logic Apps

Control Description: Provider must provide platform for viewing audit logs and managing technical/security events with minimum 6-month retention.
Azure Policy Initiative: Diagnostic Settings retention policies; Log Analytics retention
Microsoft Defender for Cloud: Recommendation: Activity log should be retained for at least one year
Azure Services/Features: Log Analytics workspace; Microsoft Sentinel; Activity Logs
Implementation Notes: Configure 6-month minimum retention (recommend 1 year); enable all diagnostic categories

Control Title: Prohibition on AI Training with Customer Data
Control Description: Provider cloud companies must not use organization data to train AI applications or other applications for purposes not agreed upon.
Azure Services/Features: Azure OpenAI data processing controls; Contractual terms
Implementation Notes: Review Azure data processing terms; opt out of model training; document data handling requirements

Control Description: Provider must provide training and knowledge transfer to organization's technical and user staff on security configurations and audit operations.
Azure Services/Features: Microsoft Learn; Azure training resources
Implementation Notes: Include training requirements in contract; document staff certifications

Control Description: Provider must demonstrate valid international certifications: ISO 27001, ISO 27002, ISO 27017, ISO 27018, ISO 22237, SOC 2.
Azure Services/Features: Azure Compliance Manager; Azure compliance documentation
Implementation Notes: Verify Azure certifications at Microsoft Trust Center; document in compliance records

Control Description: Ensure provider's external cloud service subcontractors comply with all stated policies and controls.
Azure Services/Features: Azure subprocessor list; Contractual flow-down
Implementation Notes: Review Azure subprocessor list; ensure contractual flow-down of security requirements

Control Description: Do not allow technical support contractors or subcontractors to commit acts violating information privacy and security.
Azure Services/Features: Customer Lockbox; Access reviews; Audit logs
Implementation Notes: Enable Customer Lockbox; audit all support access; require background checks in contract

Control Description: Ensure ease of contract termination or service migration to new cloud provider.
Azure Services/Features: Azure data export; Migration tools
Implementation Notes: Document data export procedures; test migration capabilities; maintain portability

Control Description: Confirm data ownership remains with organization; provider must return all data within 10 business days of termination request in compatible format.
Azure Services/Features: Azure data export; Storage account access
Implementation Notes: Document data retrieval procedures; test export capabilities; specify format requirements in contract

Control Description: Document all contractual matters in comprehensive SLA including availability, reliability, scalability, business continuity, and technical support, plus NDA reviewed by legal department.
Azure Services/Features: Azure SLA documentation; NDA templates
Implementation Notes: Review Azure SLAs; negotiate custom terms where needed; obtain legal review

Control Description: Establish agreed mechanism for data destruction upon contract termination per international certifications and quality standards.
Azure Services/Features: Azure data deletion; Cryptographic erasure
Implementation Notes: Document destruction procedures; require certificate of destruction; use cryptographic erasure

Control Description: When contracting with external cloud provider outside Oman, data center locations must be in countries with privacy and data protection laws compatible with Oman legislation.
Azure Policy Initiative: Allowed Locations policy; Region restriction policies
Azure Services/Features: Azure Policy Allowed Locations; Azure region selection
Implementation Notes: Restrict to approved regions; document data protection law compatibility assessment

Control Description: Provider must hold valid ISO 27001 certification for Information Security Management System.
Azure Services/Features: Azure compliance documentation
Implementation Notes: Verify at Microsoft Trust Center; assign ISO 27001:2022 policy initiative

Control Description: Provider must comply with ISO 27002 guidance for establishing and maintaining ISMS.
Azure Services/Features: Azure compliance documentation
Implementation Notes: Verify alignment; assign ISO 27002:2022 policy initiative

Control Description: Provider must hold valid ISO 27017 certification for cloud security controls.
Azure Services/Features: Azure compliance documentation
Implementation Notes: Verify at Microsoft Trust Center; assign ISO 27017:2015 policy initiative

Control Description: Provider must hold valid ISO 27018 certification for cloud privacy protection.
Azure Services/Features: Azure compliance documentation
Implementation Notes: Verify at Microsoft Trust Center; document privacy controls

Control Description: Provider must hold valid ISO 22237 certification for data center specifications.
Azure Services/Features: Azure compliance documentation
Implementation Notes: Verify data center certifications for selected regions

Control Description: Provider must hold valid SOC 2 Type II report demonstrating security controls for data processing.
Azure Services/Features: Azure SOC reports
Implementation Notes: Request Azure SOC 2 Type II report from Microsoft Trust Center; review annually
